allow: PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed PID $\($p.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Port 3000 is free" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,5173,5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\) on port $\($_.LocalPort\)" })
